notes: Failed to launch properly, copied config.ini from NTFS drive, and renamed OC1.1 to Outcast 1.1; it launched but wouln't load save games nor would the game properly close.
title: Outcast 1.1

notes: Won't start. Renaming file to Outcast 1.1.exe got it to briefly load, but then complains about a missing config.ini and tells you to delete config.ini...which doesn't exist (huh?) and run the launcher again. Repeat endlessly.
title: Outcast 1.1

notes: The first time you launch the game you'll get a black window with a Outcast log that blink and doesn't display properly but you have the audio, if you press Escape the game then load normally and you can play without issues. Later, from the launcher you'll then be able to load your save directly and this will skip the intro video. I have only played a few minutes but the performance was good, and there was no graphical issues at all.
title: Outcast 1.1
